title: roella ciliata var. minor
intro: Roella ciliata var. minor, also known as the lesser roella, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae and is commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Roella ciliata var. minor include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as reduce swelling and pain. Roella ciliata var. minor can be prepared as a herbal remedy by making teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
